GNA.business: The Co. has an extensive product portfolio, built over the years, offering a large variety of axle shafts, spindles, and other shafts having a combined capacity of 6.7 million pieces.
GNA.market_position: The market share in the rear axle shafts was estimated to be nearly 50%.
triggers: Down cycle was dominant and visible in stock prices.
Market was very pessimistic about Auto sector as a whole

FIEM.business: The co. enjoys a significant market share for the supply of automotive lighting & signaling equipment and rearview mirrors to Two-wheeler and Four-wheeler OEMs.
FIEM.market_position: In FY19, it had about 27-30% market share of the total 2 Wheeler headlamp market in India. The market share in the conventional lighting side in FY22 is estimated to be more than 30%.
triggers: Down cycle was dominant and visible in stock prices.
Market was very pessimistic about Auto sector as a whole
